detail.description:
Embark on a mysterious investigation in Mystery Town: Merge Games！
Can you merge everything into better and more useful items to solve thrilling puzzles? In Mystery Town, every match counts! Uncover hidden secrets and discover that here, the right merge can change everything.

Welcome to Mystery Town, where you can unlock new themed adventures every week—experience cooking delicious food, hunt for clues, catch culprits in new cases, and rebuild parts of the town you'll love.

detail.recentChanges: More exciting events will be launched one after another, stay tuned!

extremely predatory pay to play and pay to win tactics. constant events running that are so short yo
yes you have to top up if you don't wait three hrs for 100 energy. yes there are ads to watch to get
instagram ad states energy is unlimited but it isn't. false advertising.
